howItWorks.label: The Process
howItWorks.headline: Four Steps to Your Future
howItWorks.step1desc: Browse courses built by real engineers and educators across AI, Robotics, and STEM.
howItWorks.step2desc: Interactive sessions, live projects, hands-on robotics kits. Your trainer comes to you.

howItWorks.step4desc: Join a community of Tamil innovators reaching students in 5 countries.
